case_title: MARSHALL, VICTOR et al VS IQBAL, MUHAMMAD MR.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MARSHALL, VICTOR MARSHALL, JULIANA ABREA, YOLANDA S. AS TO DEFENDANT IQBAL, MUHAMMAD MR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-05-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT IQBAL, MUHAMMAD MR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARSHALL, VICTOR MARSHALL, JULIANA ABREA, YOLANDA S. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IQBAL, MUHAMMAD MR. $800.00 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $848.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT IQBAL, MUHAMMAD MR.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 26275, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARSHALL, VICTOR MARSHALL, JULIANA ABREA, YOLANDA S. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT IQBAL, MUHAMMAD MR. PLAINTIFF TO PAY DEFENDANT $74 COURT COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT IS FILED AS TO THE PLTFS MARSHALL, VICTOR & JULIANA; ABREA, YOLANDA S.
FOR COMPUTER PURPOSES, DEFT'S NAME IS ENTERED BUT PLTF'S OWE MONEY TO THE DEFT IQBAL, MUHAMMAD PER APPEAL RULING.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT IQBAL, MUHAMMAD MR.
